prompt: I need to add webhook support to maestro so that when a task completes, it can POST a JSON payload to a configured URL. The payload should include task ID, status, duration, and feature name. It should support retries with exponential backoff. Config lives in .maestro/config.json. Only HTTP POST, no other methods.

assertions.name: acknowledges-given-info
assertions.description: Recognizes and acknowledges what the user already specified (payload fields, config location, POST-only, retries)

assertions.name: skips-answered-questions
assertions.description: Does not re-ask about payload format, config location, HTTP method, or retry strategy

assertions.name: asks-remaining-gaps
assertions.description: Focuses questions on unspecified areas like auth/headers, retry limits, timeout, error handling, or testing
